REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. THE COURT NOTES THAT THE OPERATIVE CONTRACT (STIPULATION) IS NOT ATTACHED TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING FOR PLAINTIFF TO SPECIFY THE BREACHED CONTRACTUAL CLAUSE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, IN SUPPORT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COURT NOTES THAT OPPOSITION REFERENCES CONCEALMENT, FRAUD IN THE INDUCEMENT AND NON-DISCLOSURE. TO THE EXTENT PLAINTIFF WISHES TO ASSERT ALL OF THESE, PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO DO SO, AND HAS TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THESE CLAIMS. DEMURER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION IS OVERRULED. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY STATED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THIS MOTION IS MADE APPARENTLY ON BEHALF OF "UBER" (ACCORDING, UBER RESPECTFULLY REQUESTS THAT...") SEEKING TO STRIKE CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT BECAUSE "PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS THAT WOULD ENTITLE THEM TO RECOVER PUNITIVE DAMAGES, ATTORNEYS' FEES, OR PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST." POINTS AND AUTHORITIES DO NOT SUPPORT THE MOTION TO STRIKE ATTORNEY'S FEES. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING MALICE, OPPRESSION OR FRAUD. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST REQUEST. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT WHADOW INVESTMENTS LLC DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT;

is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. The Court notes that the operative contract (Stipulation) is not attached to the Second Amended Complaint. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is Granted. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the causes of action for breach of contract and breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing for plaintiff to specify the breached contractual clause. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for fraud for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of this cause of action. The Court notes that opposition references concealment, fraud in the inducement and non-disclosure. To the extent Plaintiff wishes to assert all of these, Plaintiff has leave to do so, and has to allege facts in support of each element of these claims. Demurer to the cause of action for conversion is overruled. This cause of action is sufficiently stated.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT WHADOW INVESTMENTS LLC MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT;

is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. This motion is made apparently on behalf of "Uber" (According, Uber respectfully requests that...") seeking to strike certain portions of the complaint because "Plaintiff's allegations do not allege facts that would entitle them to recover punitive damages, attorneys' fees, or pre-judgment interest." Points and Authorities do not support the motion to strike attorney's fees. Motion is DENIED as to the request for attorney's fees. Motion is GRANTED as to the request for punitive damages with leave to amend to allege facts supporting malice, oppression or fraud. Motion is DENIED as to the pre-judgment interest request.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
